result.summary: Found 1 major visual issue: the page content overflows/clips on the right side, causing several UI elements to be partially cut off on mobile.

issues.description: The horizontal category row and game grid are truncated on the right edge, so the last chip/cards are only partially visible and appear cut off.
issues.suggestion: Fix the responsive layout widths and overflow handling so the content fits within the viewport, or provide a clearly scrollable horizontal container with proper padding and visible scroll affordance.
